title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Agent Sentinel — Scan OpenClaw/Hermes skills for risky permission patterns be...
content:
Scan OpenClaw/Hermes skills for risky permission patterns before installation

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/agent-sentinel
